Q: A person was asked to state his age in years. His reply was, "Take my age three years hence, multiply it by 3 and then subtract three times my age three years ago and you will know how old I am." What was the age of the person?

A: Let the present age of the person = x years
His age three years hence = x + 3
His age three years before = x - 3
According to the question,
3 (x + 3) - 3 (x - 3) = x
3x + 9 - 3x + 9 = x
18 = x
Hence, the age of the person = 18 years.
